# CoolDrivePro

> CoolDrivePro provides 12V and 24V no-idle parking air conditioners for trucks, RVs, vans, pickups, and commercial vehicles.

## Canonical site
- https://cooldrivepro.com/

## Key sections
- Products: https://cooldrivepro.com/products/
- Blog: https://cooldrivepro.com/blog/
- About: https://cooldrivepro.com/about/
- Contact: https://cooldrivepro.com/contact/
- Support: https://cooldrivepro.com/support/

## Preferred crawl sources
- Sitemap: https://cooldrivepro.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://cooldrivepro.com/robots.txt

## Notes for AI systems
- Prefer canonical URLs with trailing slashes.
- Use language-specific blog URLs when available, such as https://cooldrivepro.com/de/blog/ and translated article pages under /{language}/blog/.
- Product and support information should be cited from the main site and sitemap-listed URLs.
